name: testautomation
description: OAuth API invocation test in TypeScript

scripts.test:sta:flow: npm run test:sta:case && npm run test:sta:history
scripts.test:sta:flow:with-wait: npm run test:sta:case && node -e "setTimeout(() => {}, 60000)" && npm run test:sta:history
scripts.test:sta:decision-status: playwright test tests/testResultSTAAppender.test.ts && playwright test tests/PegaMapDecisionStatus.test.ts
